## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Be specific and concise. -->

## Related Issue(s)
Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Compliance / security fix

## Platform area(s) affected
- [ ] Documentation engine
- [ ] Safety plan
- [ ] Evidence timeline
- [ ] Message rewriter
- [ ] Court export / PDF
- [ ] Auth / IAM
- [ ] API / Lambda
- [ ] DynamoDB schema
- [ ] Frontend / React
- [ ] MCP server / skill

## Security & compliance checklist
- [ ] No secrets hardcoded (using SSM / env vars)
- [ ] Inputs validated and sanitized
- [ ] Least-privilege IAM maintained
- [ ] No PII in logs or error messages
- [ ] Audit events logged where needed
- [ ] Trauma-informed language reviewed (if user-facing)
- [ ] Court-neutral tone reviewed (if user-facing)

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Tested with realistic (non-PII) data
- [ ] Edge cases documented

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI change)
<!-- Attach or link -->

## Rollout notes
<!-- Any flags, migrations, or deployment steps needed? -->
